critic_raw:
Issue 1: Transaction feed mismatch — baseline from settlement batch, challenger from authorization stream.
Issue 2: Label maturation mismatch — baseline includes pending disputes, challenger uses 60-day settled-only.
Issue 3: Q4 threshold tuned on Q4 and reported on Q4 — threshold self-selection.
Issue 4: Model and pipeline changed simultaneously — gains not attributable to model alone.
defender_raw: All four issues are structurally valid. The feed mismatch means different transaction populations. The label maturation mismatch means different positive-label definitions. The Q4 threshold self-selection inflates precision. The model-pipeline bundling prevents attribution. A rescoring exercise on one feed with one label rule and predeclared thresholds is required.
adjudication_raw:
Round 1: All four issues conceded by defender. Points resolved: 4.

Round 2 (forced): No new arguments. Verdict unchanged.

Final verdict: critique_wins. Both sides agree the current comparison is insufficient.
